title: /spawn
description: Adds a command to get to the (world)spawn
body:
With this project can you use a command to get to spawn:
**/trigger spawn**

The default coordinates are  **0 64 0** .
You cant take damage, move or fall for the next 3 seconds after you triggerd spawn. After you used you it, you have a 2min cooldown. This is to make it balanced.

If you set your Worldspawn / spawn to another coodinate or the hight is wrong (exp. you are in the air or in a block), you can change it. For that go to your world folder, go to datapacks and then to spawn_teleport
**data/spawn_teleport/function/cast_success.mcfunction**

There you should see somewhere **tp @s 0 64 0**, just change to coords

Thanks for 100 downloads😀
